name: @ramzes1385/rise-ui-kit
description: Библиотека Vue 3 UI-компонентов с полной типизацией TypeScript, дизайн-системой на CSS-переменных, тёмной темой и многоуровневым тестированием.
author: Roman <rasspopov.roman@gmail.com>

scripts.test:storybook: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16384 vitest run --config build/tests/vitest.config.ts --project storybook --no-file-parallelism
scripts.test:storybook:coverage: cross-env COVERAGE_MODE=storybook NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16384 vitest run --config build/tests/vitest.config.ts --project storybook --coverage --no-file-parallelism
scripts.test:a11y: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16384 vitest run --config build/tests/vitest.config.ts --project storybook
scripts.test:a11y:ci: npm run test:a11y:coverage && npm run test:a11y
scripts.test:components:coverage: cross-env COVERAGE_MODE=components CI=true NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16384 vitest run --config build/tests/vitest.config.ts --project unit-integration --coverage --coverage.include=src/components/**/*.vue --coverage.include=src/components/BaseTour/useTourLogic.ts --coverage.exclude=src/components/BaseChat/** --coverage.exclude=src/components/BaseTable/** --coverage.exclude=src/components/BaseEditor/** --coverage.exclude=src/components/BaseCalendar/** --coverage.exclude=src/components/BaseDatePicker/** --coverage.exclude=src/components/BaseFileUpload/** --coverage.exclude=src/components/BaseImage/** --coverage.exclude=src/components/BaseSelect/** --coverage.exclude=src/components/BaseSlider/** --coverage.exclude=src/components/BaseRange/** --coverage.exclude=src/components/BaseTabs/** --coverage.exclude=src/components/BaseTooltip/** --coverage.exclude=src/components/BaseTree/** --coverage.exclude=src/components/BaseSlideover/** --coverage.thresholds.lines=100 --coverage.thresholds.functions=100 --coverage.thresholds.statements=100 --coverage.thresholds.branches=0 --coverage.thresholds.perFile
scripts.test:composables:coverage: cross-env COVERAGE_MODE=composables CI=true NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16384 vitest run --config build/tests/vitest.config.ts --project unit-integration --coverage --coverage.exclude=src/composables/useColumnResize/useColumnResize.ts --coverage.reportsDirectory=coverage/composables --coverage.thresholds.100 --coverage.thresholds.perFile
scripts.test:utils:coverage: cross-env COVERAGE_MODE=utils CI=true NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16384 vitest run --config build/tests/vitest.config.ts --project unit-integration --coverage --coverage.reportsDirectory=coverage/utils --coverage.thresholds.100 --coverage.thresholds.perFile
scripts.test:components-heavy:coverage: cross-env CI=true NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16384 vitest run --config build/tests/vitest.config.ts --project unit-integration --coverage --coverage.include=src/components/BaseChat/**/*.vue --coverage.include=src/components/BaseTable/**/*.vue --coverage.include=src/components/BaseEditor/**/*.vue --coverage.include=src/components/BaseCalendar/**/*.vue --coverage.include=src/components/BaseDatePicker/**/*.vue --coverage.include=src/components/BaseFileUpload/**/*.vue --coverage.include=src/components/BaseImage/**/*.vue --coverage.include=src/components/BaseSelect/**/*.vue --coverage.include=src/components/BaseSlider/**/*.vue --coverage.include=src/components/BaseRange/**/*.vue --coverage.include=src/components/BaseTabs/**/*.vue --coverage.include=src/components/BaseTooltip/**/*.vue --coverage.include=src/components/BaseTree/**/*.vue --coverage.include=src/components/BaseSlideover/**/*.vue --coverage.reportsDirectory=coverage/components-heavy --coverage.thresholds.lines=0 --coverage.thresholds.functions=0 --coverage.thresholds.branches=0 --coverage.thresholds.statements=0
scripts.test:coverage:merged: npm run test:components:coverage && npm run test:components-heavy:coverage && npm run test:composables:coverage && npm run test:utils:coverage && npm run test:storybook:coverage && node scripts/merge-coverage.mjs
scripts.test:vitest: cross-env CI=true NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16384 vitest run --config build/tests/vitest.config.ts --project unit-integration --coverage
scripts.test:all: npm run test:components:coverage && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:visual
scripts.build:lib: npm run build:lib:js && npm run build:lib:types && npm run clean:lib-dist
scripts.ci:validate: npm run lint && npm run test:unit && npm run pack:dry
